privileged_info_summary: The practice log analyzer task operates on synthetic student practice data with 15 students (NOT 12 as stated in README.md), containing 4 weeks of practice minutes with weekly goals of 60, 90, 120, or 150 minutes. Two students (Marcus Lee and Mia White) have missing Week 3 data. The task requires formulas to calculate totals, goal percentages, and status categories using thresholds: Excellent (≥100%), On Track (80-99%), Needs Encouragement (50-79%), and Urgent Check-in (<50%). Sample calculations are Emma Johnson (510 min, 106.25%), Marcus Lee (260 min, 72.22%), and Sophia Chen (250 min, 41.67%).
